case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS GRUVER, DONALD JR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $235.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT GRUVER, DONALD JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
